caption: In a large, well-lit hall with beige walls and recessed ceiling lighting, a man performs a martial arts demonstration on a blue mat. He is dressed in a traditional blue tunic and matching trousers. He holds a long wooden staff topped with a red tassel, which he maneuvers through a series of fluid motions. In the background, a diverse audience of people in casual and formal attire sits at long tables covered with white and red cloths, watching the performance. Some audience members sit on the floor. Throughout the sequence, the man shifts his weight and rotates his body, swinging the staff in wide arcs. He moves from a wide stance, bringing the staff across his body and then thrusting it forward and upward, with the red tassel blurring as it moves through the air. There is no visible on-screen text or logos.
